storyInfo: Sakiko faces her dream head on and hesitates. Her 'mother' notices her struggle and encourages her to leave the dream and seek out reality. Sakiko and her mother bid each other a final farewell.

attributes.content: Mother, would you mind waiting a moment?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Of course. Go ahead.
attributes.name: Mother

attributes.content: Girls, are you alright?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Nngh... I'm okay. Butt hurts a little, but I'm fine...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: I swear I saw Miss Iris too just now...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Mmf, mrrmrmff!
A familiar voice can be heard from deep within a hay pile.
Geh... Quick, we gotta dig Iris out!
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: R-Right!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: (Gasping for breath) I... I almost suffocated!
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Weren't you two collecting children's wishes? What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Hee-hee! It all went better than expected. The children here are surprisingly good, you know, so we wrapped up ahead of time.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: I thought I'd give driving in the countryside a shot, but then car trouble hit while I was at the wheel, and...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Not my first time repairing vehicles like this one. Hurry, let's fix this one up together.
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: *sigh* I can hardly tell if my luck is supposed to be good or rotten today...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I couldn't shake the worry something might happen, you know.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I didn't expect our work to proceed so well today, and I certainly didn't expect this little mishap.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: I only hope we can have this fixed soon... At least then we can be on our way back by tonight.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Tonight...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko turns to look behind her.
Not too far away, Sakiko's mother is watching her and her friends with a smile.
She notices her daughter's glance, and gives a light nod.
Would that be... your mother?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You very much resemble one another, especially the eyes and the mouth! I feel both a gentle warmth and a firm resolution in you.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: But I... I have no resolve.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: What makes you say that?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Miss Iris, you're a fairy, if I'm not mistaken?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Yes... Is something wrong?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Fairies listen to people's wishes, and then temporarily make them 'reality' in their dreams... correct?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...Correct.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: But if—if people are well and truly trapped in their dreams, never to pluck themselves out, what should be done then?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: A real fairy would never permit that to happen in the first place.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: If you spend too long in a dream, you lose the ability to discern between dream and reality.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: What if they never wake up?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko, the worst outcome has never been the inability to wake up. Rather, it is when you accept everything in your dream as the truth, and then you wake, only to find that all you have experienced was a fleeting mirage.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: After living a lifetime of happiness in the dream, you find yourself back in reality, back at the very beginning again.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Your body is young, but your soul is old. Your dream is well beyond your grasp. You are left with no choice but to carry on in life, utterly alone.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Can you really call that a good dream?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: If it is doomed to fail, it should not be fled from in dreams; if they are destined to be missed, you must bid them farewell properly.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Sakiko looks back again.
Oh, I appear to have gone on a little long... Am I interrupting your reunion with your mother?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: ...No, nothing of the sort!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I apologize. Someone very important to me asked me the same question, once upon a time.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Because of my inability to give a firm answer then, things turned irrecoverable.
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Hence, I now lend such concern to this...
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Heeey—!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: The car's all fixed up!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Vigna, no more touching! No touching ever!
attributes.name: Bena

attributes.content: Guh...
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: C'mon, girls, get on—
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Miss Sakiko, will you be coming back with us?
attributes.name: Iris

attributes.content: Sakiko turns once more to look at her 'mother'.
She's still standing there, as though she's awaiting something.
Is she awaiting Sakiko's promise? Or perhaps Sakiko's verdict?
She simply stands there, looking on at her daughter with the warmest smile.
It's okay, Sakiko. You can stay here a little longer. You've been worn out lately, yeah? You're due for a vacation anyway. I'll let HR know.
attributes.name: Vigna

attributes.content: Okay... Thank you.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Let me try again—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko, let's stop here for now.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Aren't you tired? I'll make us some tea, then we can take our time—
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I'm just nervous, that's all—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: How about a little chat, then?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Were those girls just now friends of yours?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Yes. They are my coworkers at Rhodes Island, and very good friends of mine.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Rhodes Island...
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Correct. A pharmaceutical company, boasting a landship of tremendous scale.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Aboard the ship, we live and work, sailing anywhere and everywhere in the world.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: The... 'world'?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: ...Terra.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: What an interesting word for it!
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Does Rhodes Island have a piano room you can use?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: It does. There isn't too much entertainment while the ship is sailing. Many operators while away the time by playing instruments.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: At times, I'll play a few songs on the keyboard in my dormitory room. Vigna has even formed her own band—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: And have you formed your own band, too?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I have.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Is that with Miss Vigna?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: No. It's with others...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Well, now I'm curious, Sakiko. What are these fellow band members of yours like?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I have a drummer who constantly clashes with me over just about everything, though her ambition and hardworking nature are second to none. We resemble sisters-in-arms more than we do friends.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I have a bassist whose technique is superb. She handles all our behind-the-scenes work, schedules included, with great diligence. As a colleague, there could be no one more trustworthy.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I have a guitarist-vocalist who excels at songwriting. She has her own work as an idol to take care of, but in spite of how busy it makes her, she never ceases to support me.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: And I have another guitarist—we've been friends since childhood. She... she was always there for me, even when I left home and was all alone…
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: By the sound of it, you're quite the close-knit band.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: No, the reality is we constantly argue. We even disbanded before.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Have you all made up since?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I got separated from everyone.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: They are somewhere far, far away. Somewhere I cannot reach.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: How far away? From Victoria to Ursus? Or even farther than that?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Why the hesitation?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Because... Because...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...Because I'm afraid that finding them means leaving you behind.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I'm scared I won't be able to see you again—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Silly girl. I'll always be here.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: But—didn't you leave me behind?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.text: 'Look, dear, Sakiko is calling out to me...'
'Good. This key first, then this key...'
'Wow! Now I can play the same sounds as you, Mother!'
'I want to keep learning the piano with you, Mother! I want to be with you all the time!'
'With a condition like hers, we'd be lucky to last as long as she did.'
'Sakiko, I'll do everything I can for you.'
'Father... why do you drink so much?'
'Father, Mother would be so sad if she saw you like this!'
'Sakiko, I'm begging you... Just leave me be.'
Mother, I know... I've always known.
I shouldn't be here. This is not my world.
The sweetest dreams cannot last forever. The day will come when I have to leave you.
How I wish—the time for farewell would come a little later...

attributes.content: The warmth of her body... The realness of her breathing.
Sakiko's mother gazes warmly upon her.
I'm sorry, Sakiko... Mother lied to you.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Huh...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You knew, didn't you? That I wasn't your real mother.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I'm sorry. I've been so careful to keep this little white lie going.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I wasn't there at your high school entrance ceremony. Before you asked me that question, my memory of you was still in middle school.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: And I don't know why it is, but when I see you smile these days, there are dark clouds hanging above you...
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Sakiko. When did you start making this kind of face?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Just what suffering have you been through, in this stretch of time I know nothing about?
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I'm sorry. I don't know anything about this. All I know is that during your hardest, most painful moments, I wasn't there for you.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Sakiko, I am so, so truly happy that I get to see you.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I really, really want to see you grow up.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: And I want to stand right there in front of the stage and see your live shows.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: And I want to meet those new friends of yours.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I'm very greedy. I want to know everything about you, and be there by your side.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: But because I'm your mother... and because I love you so much...
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: I want you to leave this place, and seek out your real life.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Go, Sakiko.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Go back to your own 'world'.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Mother...!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: The emotion welling up in Sakiko's heart at last overflows. She buries her head in her mother's chest and bursts into tears.
In contrast, as she has always done, Sakiko's mother simply strokes her back and consoles her.
Huh? Sakiko, are you off again?
attributes.name: 'Father'

attributes.content: Sakiko has something important to do.
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Oh, you just got home. Can't you stay a little longer...?
attributes.name: 'Father'

attributes.content: Dear...
attributes.name: 'Mother'

attributes.content: Alright!
attributes.name: 'Father'

attributes.content: Sakiko, your mother and I are on the same page!
attributes.name: 'Father'

attributes.content: (Breaking up) Just... Just... remember to eat right while you're away from home!
attributes.name: 'Father'

attributes.content: Right. I will.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Okay... I'll be off now.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sure!
attributes.name: Mother & Father

attributes.content: Have a safe journey, Sakiko—
attributes.name: Mother & Father
